selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 例证, 插图
words.definition: n. artwork that helps make something clear or attractive

words.translation: n. 拇指；vt. 以拇指拨弄, 笨拙地摆弄, 用拇指翻旧, 迅速翻阅, 作搭车手势
words.definition: n. the thick short innermost digit of the forelimb

words.translation: n. 雄性动物, 雄猫
words.definition: n. male cat

words.translation: prep. 在...之上, 迫近, 紧接着
words.definition: prep. On; -- used in all the senses of that word, with which it

words.translation: a. 红的, 红色的, 红肿的, 流血的；n. 红色, 红颜料, 赤字
words.definition: s. of a color at the end of the color spectrum (next to orange); resembling the color of blood or cherries or tomatoes or rubies

words.translation: a. 坏的；n. 坏
words.definition: a. having undesirable or negative qualities

words.translation: n. 盒子, 箱, 方框, 一巴掌；vt. 装...入盒中, 装箱, 打耳光
words.definition: n. a (usually rectangular) container; may have a lid

words.translation: n. 鱼, 鱼肉, 鱼类, 接合板；vt. 钓, 钓鱼, 查出, 用接合板连接
words.definition: n. any of various mostly cold-blooded aquatic vertebrates usually having scales and breathing through gills

words.translation: n. 孔, 洞, 穴, 漏洞；vt. 挖洞, 掘坑
words.definition: n. an opening into or through something

words.translation: n. 厨房, 全套炊具
words.definition: n. a room equipped for preparing meals

words.translation: n. 书, 书籍, 帐簿, 名册, 工作簿；v. 登记, 预订
words.definition: n. a written work or composition that has been published (printed on pages bound together)

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: a. 美丽的
words.definition: a. delighting the senses or exciting intellectual or emotional admiration

words.translation: n. 鸟, 羽毛球；vi. 打鸟
words.definition: n. warm-blooded egg-laying vertebrates characterized by feathers and forelimbs modified as wings

words.translation: n. 椅子, 显要的席位, 主席；vt. 使入座, 使就任要职
words.definition: n. a seat for one person, with a support for the back

words.translation: prep. 越过, 穿过, 与...相交叉, 在...的对面；adv. 交叉, 到另一边, 在对面, 成十字
words.definition: r. to the opposite side

words.translation: n. 门
words.definition: n. a swinging or sliding barrier that will close the entrance to a room or building or vehicle

words.translation: n. 前面, 开头, 前线, 阵线, 态度；vt. 面对, 朝向, 对抗
words.definition: n. the side that is forward or prominent

words.translation: n. 女孩, 少女, 女佣
words.definition: n. a young woman

words.translation: a. 坚硬的, 硬的, 难的, 艰苦的, 困难的, 坚固的, 猛烈的, 艰难的, 结实的, 确实的；adv. 坚硬地, 努力地, 辛苦地, 接近地, 猛烈地, 牢固地
words.definition: a. dispassionate;

words.translation: n. 头, 头脑, 领袖, 脑袋, 最前的部分；vt. 为首, 朝向, 前进, 用头顶
words.definition: n. the upper part of the human body or the front part of the body in animals; contains the face and brains

words.translation: n. 早晨, 早上, 初期
words.definition: n. the time period between dawn and noon

words.translation: n. 老鼠, 胆小羞怯的人, 鼠标；vi. 捕鼠, 窥探
words.definition: n. any of numerous small rodents typically resembling diminutive rats having pointed snouts and small ears on elongated bodies with slender usually hairless tai

words.translation: n. 无, 不关紧要之事, 零；adv. 毫不, 决不
words.definition: n. a quantity of no importance

words.translation: adv. 一次, 曾经, 一旦；conj. 一旦, 一经
words.definition: r. on one occasion

words.translation: a. 几个的, 一些的, 各自的；pron. 几个
words.definition: s. (used with count nouns) of an indefinite number more than 2 or 3 but not many

words.translation: n. 顶部, 顶端, 极点, 上面, 上部, 顶篷, 最高地位, 首位, 陀螺；a. 最高的, 顶上的, 头等的
words.definition: n. the upper part of anything

words.translation: n. 煤, 木炭；v. 加煤
words.definition: n. fossil fuel consisting of carbonized vegetable matter deposited in the Carboniferous period

words.translation: n. 日落, 同伙, 组合, 集合, 装置；vt. 放, 安置, 放置, 设定, 使凝结, 点燃, 确定, 点缀, 使就位, 树立, 分配, 调整
words.definition: n. a group of things of the same kind that belong together and are so used

words.translation: n. 衣服
n. 晚餐, 正餐, 宴会
words.definition: n. the main meal of the day served in the evening or at midday

words.translation: n. 地板, 楼层, 底部, 底价；vt. 铺地板, 打倒
words.definition: n. the inside lower horizontal surface (as of a room, hallway, tent, or other structure)

words.translation: n. 桌子, 餐桌, 工作台, 铭文, 表格, 表, 高原, 平地层；vt. 搁置, 嵌合, 制表, 把...列入议事日程
words.definition: n. a set of data arranged in rows and columns

words.translation: n. 故事, 谎言, 谣言, 陈述, 叙述
adv. 在后地；prep. 在...背后
words.definition: r. in or to or toward the rear

words.translation: a. 困难的
words.definition: a. not easy; requiring great physical or mental effort to accomplish or comprehend or endure

words.translation: n. 驾车, 快车道, 推进力, 驱动, 动力, 击球, 驱动器；vt. 开车, 驱使, 推动, 驾驶

words.translation: a. 早的, 早熟的；adv. 很早, 初
words.definition: a. at or near the beginning of a period of time or course of events or before the usual or expected time

words.translation: n. 充足, 够, 很多；a. 充足的, 足够
words.definition: n. an adequate quantity; a quantity that is large enough to achieve a purpose

words.translation: pron. 每件事物, 所有事物
words.definition: n. Whatever pertains to the subject under consideration;

words.translation: n. 火, 炉火, 电炉, 火灾, 闪光体, 炮火, 热情；vt. 点燃, 烧制, 使发光, 激动, 放枪, 解雇
words.definition: n. the event of something burning (often destructive)

words.translation: n. 全部, 完整；a. 充满的, 完全的, 丰富的, 完美的, 丰满的, 详尽的
n. 一半, 半场, 不完全；a. 一半的, 不完全的, 部分的, 半场的
words.definition: n. one of two divisions into which some games or performances are divided: the two divisions are separated by an interval

words.translation: n. 打击, 打, 冲撞, 讽刺；vt. 打, 打击, 碰撞, 打中, 袭击, 偶然碰上
words.definition: n. (baseball) a successful stroke in an athletic contest (especially in baseball)

words.translation: n. 最少, 最小, 最小限度；a. 最少的, 最小的
words.definition: n. something that is of no importance

words.translation: n. 中央, 中间, 腰部；a. 中央的, 中庸的, 中间的
words.definition: n. an intermediate part or section

words.translation: n. 片刻, 瞬间, 重要, 阶段, 力矩
words.definition: n. a particular point in time

words.translation: a. 近的, 近亲的, 近似的；adv. 接近, 亲近
words.definition: a. not far distant in time or space or degree or circumstances

words.translation: n. 外面, 外表, 外界；a. 外面的, 外表的, 外界的
words.definition: n. the region that is outside of something

words.translation: n. 纸, 文件, 文章, 报纸, 证券, 证件；vt. 用纸糊, 贴壁纸于, 用纸包装

words.translation: a. 真的, 真实的, 实际的, 实在的, 不动(产)的, 实数的；n. 实数, 现实
words.definition: a. being or occurring in fact or actuality; having verified existence; not illusory; not ghosts"

words.translation: n. 房间, 空位, 场所；vi. 住宿, 居住
words.definition: n. an area within a building enclosed by walls and floor and ceiling

words.translation: n. 故事, 小说, 传奇, 描述, 阅历, 经历, 层

words.translation: n. 白色, 洁白, 眼白, 白种人, 蛋白；a. 白色的, 纯洁的, 白种的, 苍白的, 空白的, 幸运的

words.translation: n. 小刀, 匕首；vt. 切割, 伤害, 切, 戳

words.definition: n. sound of any kind (especially unintelligible or dissonant sound)

words.translation: vt. 烧, 烧毁, 烧伤；vi. 燃烧, 发热, 烧毁

words.translation: adv. 尤其, 特别, 格外
